ai.subtitle: Hi 😊 Main Amy hoon — parenting ke baare mein kuch bhi poochein, main yahaan hoon ❤️
ai.empty_heading: Hi 😊 Main Amy hoon, aapki parenting co-pilot
ai.empty_body: Chinta mat karein, main yahaan help ke liye hoon ❤️ Neend, khaana, behavior, school anxiety, screen time — kuch bhi poochein.

ai.suggested_q6: Mera bachha school jaane se darta hai — main kaise help karoon?

landing.badge: AI se chalne wala Parenting Coach
landing.hero_headline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
landing.hero_sub: Apne bachhe ke liye step-by-step, science-backed parenting plans paayein — aapki AI Parenting Coach se.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Shuru karna free · Koi credit card zaruri nahi
landing.problems_sub: Har parent inka saamna karte hain. Amy Coach aapko inhe solve karne mein madad karti hai — ek time pe ek personalized step.
landing.not_alone: Aap akele nahi hain — aur aapko khud isse samajhne ki zarurat nahi hai.
landing.features_heading: Smart Parenting ke liye Sab Kuch
landing.features_sub: Ek platform. Aapke bachhe ke liye design kiye gaye kayi powerful tools.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Asli Parenting Challenges Solve Karein
landing.coach_desc: Nakhron se lekar screen time tak, neend se lekar dhyaan tak — Amy Coach aapko gehre, personalized step-by-step plans deti hai jo waqai kaam karte hain. Koi general advice nahi, sirf aapke bachhe ke liye science-backed solutions.
landing.highlight_1: Aapke bachhe ke liye personalized plans
landing.feature_routine_desc: Structured, personalized routines banayein jo aapke bachhe ko strong habits banane mein madad karein.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Ek hi jagah pe activities, insights, aur curated parenting guidance access karein.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Kuch bhi poochein aur jab bhi zarurat ho turant parenting advice paayein.
landing.mid_cta: Amy Coach se shuru karein aur jaise-jaise aap badhein, aur explore karein.
landing.how_sub: Aapke pehle personalized parenting plan ke liye teen simple steps.
landing.step1_desc: Woh parenting challenge chunein jise aap solve karna chahte hain — nakhron se lekar neend tak.
landing.step2_desc: Amy ko apne bachhe ki umar, personality, aur current habits ke baare mein batayein.
landing.step3_desc: Ek personalized, science-backed plan paayein jise aap aaj shuru kar sakte hain.
landing.trust_heading: Child Psychology aur Behavioral Science pe Banaya Gaya
landing.trust_sub: Har plan proven research pe based hai — general advice nahi. Framework pe trust karein, steps follow karein.
landing.trust1_desc: Bachhe lasting habits kaise banate hain iske proven principles pe based.
landing.trust2_desc: Top child psychologists se evidence-based strategies.
landing.trust3_desc: Duniya bhar ke experts dwara use kiye jaane wale practical parenting frameworks.
landing.final_cta_heading: Apni parenting journey shuru karne ke liye taiyaar hain?
landing.final_cta_sub: AmyNest AI ko join karein aur minutes mein ek personalized parenting plan paayein — bilkul free.
landing.footer_tagline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai

privacy.header_subtitle: Hum aapka data kaise handle karte hain
privacy.footer: © 2026 AmyNest AI. Sabhi adhikar surakshit hain.
privacy.md_intro: AmyNest ("the App") ko **AmyNest AI, Inc.** ("hum", "humein") operate karta hai. Yeh policy samjhati hai ki jab aap App use karte hain tab hum kaunsi jankari collect karte hain aur use kaise handle karte hain.
privacy.md_h2_1: 1. Hum kaunsi jankari collect karte hain
privacy.md_li_1_1: **Account ki jankari** jo aap sign up karte waqt dete hain: naam, email address, aur aapke sign-in provider se authentication identifiers.
privacy.md_li_1_2: **Child Profile ki jankari** jo aap apni marzi se enter karte hain (first name ya nickname, age, interests, routine preferences). Hum kabhi bhi kisi bachche ka last name, address, ya contact details nahi maangte.
privacy.md_li_1_3: **Routine aur task activity** jo aap App ke andar banate ya generate karte hain, jise aapka dashboard aur reward history dikhane ke liye use kiya jata hai.
privacy.md_li_1_4: **Technical data** jaise device type, OS version, app version, aur crash diagnostics, jise App ko stable rakhne ke liye use kiya jata hai.
privacy.md_h2_2: 2. Hum jankari ka kaise use karte hain
privacy.md_li_2_1: App ke core features dene ke liye (routines generate karna, tasks aur rewards track karna, aapke devices ke beech sync karna).
privacy.md_li_2_2: Aapke bheje hue support requests ka jawab dene ke liye.
privacy.md_li_2_3: App ki reliability aur performance sudharne ke liye.
privacy.md_p_2: Hum aapki personal information **nahi** bechte. Hum App ke andar bachchon ko third-party advertising **nahi** dikhate.
privacy.md_p_3: AmyNest ko parents aur guardians ke use ke liye design kiya gaya hai. App ke andar Child Profiles ko parent account manage karta hai. Hum sirf utni hi minimum jankari collect karte hain jitni bachche ka routine dikhane ke liye zaroori ho. Parents App se kabhi bhi child profile delete kar sakte hain.
privacy.md_p_4: Hum data un service providers ke saath share karte hain jo App chalane mein hamari madad karte hain (hosting, authentication, analytics, AI generation). In providers par contract ke through yeh pabandi hoti hai ki woh aapka data sirf hamari taraf se hi use karein. Kanoon ke tahat zaroorat padne par hum jankari disclose bhi kar sakte hain.
privacy.md_p_5: Aap App ke andar se, ya **support@amynest.ai** par email karke, kabhi bhi apna account aur usse judi saari jankari delete kar sakte hain. Backups 30 din ke andar hata diye jate hain.
privacy.md_h2_6: 6. Mobile app dwara use ki jane wali permissions
privacy.md_li_6_1: **Internet / Network state** — App load karne ke liye zaroori hai.
privacy.md_li_6_2: **Camera, Microphone, Photos** — sirf us waqt maanga jata hai jab aap koi aisa feature use karte hain jise inki zaroorat ho (jaise bachche ki profile picture upload karna). Hamesha optional.

tutorial.slide1_body: Stress-free mornings, smoother evenings, aur aisi routines jo sach mein tikti hain ke liye aapki AI co-parent.
tutorial.slide2_body: Amy ko apne bachche ke baare mein ek baar batayein. Woh har din sahi schedule banati hai — aur jab zindagi mein badlav aata hai, to use adjust bhi karti hai.
tutorial.slide3_body: Optional nudges aapki family ko bina pushy lage track par rakhte hain. Control aapke haath mein rehta hai.

nutrition.ebf_desc: WHO pehle 6 mahine tak sirf maa ka doodh recommend karta hai. Kisi aur khane ya paani ki zarurat nahi hai.
nutrition.ebf_hi: Vishv Swasthya Sangathan 6 mahine tak keval maa ke doodh ki salah deta hai.
nutrition.family_desc: Poore family ke liye ek meal banaiye aur umr ke hisaab se portions serve kijiye. Alag se cooking ki zarurat nahi!
nutrition.katori_note: * 1 katori ≈ 150ml cup. Bacche ki bhookh ke hisaab se adjust karein.
nutrition.score_tab_title: 🏆 Daily Nutrition Score · dainik poshan score
nutrition.score_tab_sub: {{label}} ke liye track karein · aaj kya khaya wo check karein
nutrition.tip_low: Apni nutrition badhaiye — dal, ek fruit, aur ek glass doodh add karein. · Dal, phal aur doodh zarur lein.
nutrition.tip_med: Palak ya methi jaisi hari sabziyan shamil karein. · Palak/methi zarur khayein.
nutrition.tip_high: Bas thoda aur! Packaged snack ki jagah roasted chana lein. · Bhune chane khayein.
nutrition.outstanding_sub: Consistency hi health ki key hai. Kal bhi aise hi jaari rakhein! · Har din yahi karein!
nutrition.section_nutrient_desc: {{label}} ke liye benefits, Indian food sources aur daily needs dekhne ke liye kisi nutrient par Tap karein.
nutrition.section_meal_plan: Weekly Meal Plan · saptahik bhojan yojana
nutrition.section_meal_desc: Hafte ke har din ke liye age-appropriate Indian meals.
nutrition.section_family_desc: Same meal — har family member ke liye alag portions. Ek baar cook karein, smart serve karein!
nutrition.source_footer: 📚 Source: ICMR-NIN Nutrient Requirements for Indians (2020) & WHO Guidelines

study.title: 📚 Smart Study Zone

referrals.how_it_works_premium: Premium member ke roop mein, jab {{validThreshold}} friends aapke code se Sign up karte hain AUR unmein se kam se kam {{paidThreshold}} ek paid plan kharidta hai, tab aapko ek gift token milta hai (jo friend ke liye {{rewardDays}} days free premium ke barabar hai).

sleep.label: Neend ki problem
sleep.prompt: Mere bachhe ko sone mein dikkat ho rahi hai. Mujhe kya karna chahiye?

picky_eating.label: Khaane mein nakhre
